response.step_by_step_log: Identified two songs performed on stage. Song titles were taken from the on-screen text overlays at 01:02 ('KAMIKAZE') and 04:14 ('OFFSIDE'). Both are credited to 'Masa' in the text. I attempted to search for the lyrics using the templates provided, but the search results were generic and did not provide specific, verifiable full lyrics for these particular songs that matched the context of a live concert. Therefore, the lyric fields have been set to null as per instructions.
response.global_summary: The video features a live concert performance by a virtual performer, likely associated with the "#あおばしの生誕祭2025" event, performing two songs: "KAMIKAZE" and "OFFSIDE". Both songs are credited to Masa.

scenes.description: The performer begins singing "KAMIKAZE" on stage. Title appears at 01:02.
The performer transitions into singing "OFFSIDE" on stage. Title appears at 04:14.
